text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka achieved an impressive victory at
the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
News spreads like wildfire, and her interview the
next day is packed with reporters.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Thank you all for coming today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click, click, click, click...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
With this milestone victory now behind you, what
are you planning for the future? Will you be
entering the G1 races?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Many people refer to you as the "Otherworldly
Front-Runner." What are your thoughts about the
moniker?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text: Who do you regard as your biggest rival?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: U-um... Well...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (Can this just be over already so I can train!)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That press conference was too much excitement
for me. I feel so much better out here on the
track.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not that. I just... don't think I'm very good
at them.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If it were up to me, I'd spend all my time running...
It's not easy being a racer, I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's very like you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, hi, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do you have a moment? I have something I want
to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, I have some time. What is it?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You ran very well yesterday at the Kinko Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ever since you entered the academy, you've
always focused on your love for running.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And now, to see you become this widely
celebrated... It makes me feel proud.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You were truly spectacular out there.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Your drive and determination to win is
inspiring—not to mention your overwhelming
speed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was holding their breath as they
watched you push faster and faster.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I think it's safe to say you've become the new
ideal for many Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're exaggerating...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka tries to downplay the praise, but
Air Groove grabs her shoulders gently.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, I swear I'll defeat you one day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I must.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I... I understand.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I'm grateful to you for giving me such drive
as well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running in the next Grand Prix race, the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll see you on the turf!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove holds out her right hand, and the two
of them exchange a firm shake.
